holdings.name: State Street U.S. Government Money Market Portfolio

raw.n: State Street U.S. Government Money Market Portfolio

summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Diamond Hill Large Cap Concentrated ETF (DHLX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively manages a portfolio of large-cap US companies. The fund employs a bottom-up investment process that evaluates company fundamentals in assessing value. DHLX was launched on Feb 26, 2021 and is issued by Diamond Hill.

holdings.n: State Street U.S. Government Money Market Portfolio

holdings.infoBox: DHLX is an equity ETF with a total of 21 individual holdings. The top holdings are American International Group stock at 7.06%, Berkshire Hathaway at 6.79%, Colgate-Palmolive Company at 6.27%, Aon plc at 6.18%, and Abbott Laboratories at 6.09%.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
